title: Banana Leaf Detection
shortDescription: A machine learning web application built with Python, OpenCV, scikit-learn, and Flask to detect whether a banana leaf is Healthy, Unhealthy, or Not a Leaf using image processing and KNN classification.

title: Focus Quest App
shortDescription: A productivity RPG app turning tasks into quests with XP and stats.

title: Baylora
shortDescription: A modern marketplace and trading platform where users can sell, trade, or mix transactions, with bidding, verified profiles, and secure authentication.

title: Templyx
shortDescription: A modern portfolio platform for developers with authentication, real-time features, and community interaction.

title: AI Text Summarizer
shortDescription: A web application that generates concise summaries from long text or articles using an AI-powered NLP API.
